latin: Hostis per telephonum dixit: 'aenigma subitum, iuvenis! bomba in curru publico est. si currus sub quinquaginta milia passuum per horam cecidit, omnes morientur. quid facies?'

questions.target: A bomb on a bus that detonates if speed drops below fifty
choices: A bomb at a train station
A bomb on a bus that detonates if speed drops below fifty
A ticking time bomb in a building

questions.prompt: What does the villain challenge the hero to do?
questions.target: Figure out how to save everyone
choices: Figure out how to save everyone

translation: The enemy said by phone: 'Pop quiz, hotshot! There is a bomb on the bus. If the bus drops below fifty miles per hour, everyone dies. What do you do?'
